base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of brick_block_after_hit — a tile from 1985 super mario bros. Post-hit brick (when it contained item) — converts to used-block (orange/yellow solid tile) after item emerges. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Post-hit brick (when it contained item) — converts to used-block (orange/yellow solid tile) after item emerges; different from debris-shatter case
